workflows.name: initializeOnboarding
workflows.description: Initializes the onboarding page by checking if user is authenticated and if onboarding is already completed. If completed, redirect to dashboard. Reset currentStep to 1 and clear onboardingData.

default.background: radial-gradient(circle at 20% 20%, rgba(2, 62, 138, 0.1) 0%, transparent 50%), radial-gradient(circle at 80% 80%, rgba(2, 62, 138, 0.08) 0%, transparent 50%)

default.animationKeyframes: @keyframes fadeInUp { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }
@keyframes fadeInUp { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }

children.code: return [1,2,3,4].map((step, index) => ({ step, index, isActive: step <= variables['fca96772-3cc2-4e28-a4e5-2249e3d8c713'], isCompleted: step < variables['fca96772-3cc2-4e28-a4e5-2249e3d8c713'] }))

text.en: We're excited to have you join us! This quick onboarding process will help us personalize your experience and get you started with all the tools you need.

_ww-text_text.en: We're excited to have you join us! This quick onboarding process will help us personalize your experience and get you started with all the tools you need.

default.animationKeyframes: @keyframes bounceIn { 0% { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.3); } 50% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1.05); } 70% { transform: scale(0.9); } 100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); } }

text.en: Please provide your basic information to personalize your experience.

_ww-text_text.en: Please provide your basic information to personalize your experience.

text.en: Please enter a valid display name (at least 2 characters)

_ww-text_text.en: Please enter a valid display name (at least 2 characters)

text.en: Please enter a valid phone number (at least 10 digits)

text.en: Please enter a valid address (at least 10 characters)

_ww-text_text.en: Please enter a valid address (at least 10 characters)

text.en: Upload a profile picture to personalize your account. This step is optional and can be completed later.

_ww-text_text.en: Upload a profile picture to personalize your account. This step is optional and can be completed later.

text.en: Looking great! Your profile picture is ready.

_ww-text_text.en: Looking great! Your profile picture is ready.
